title: arenaria stricta subsp. dawsonensis
intro: Arenaria stricta subsp. dawsonensis, also known as Dawson's sandwort, is a plant species endemic to Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dawson's sandwort include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
